structured.title: Walk And Theology Discussion
structured.overview: A group conversation unfolded during a walk near a beach and car park, with people checking directions on a route app, sorting out parking rules, and deciding where to head next. The practical side included confusion about the route, readjusting pins, and figuring out that parking restrictions did not yet apply. The discussion then shifted into a longer theological conversation about ministry, exams, memorizing scripture, budgeting, leadership, and differing views within the church around complementarianism and leadership roles. They also mentioned meeting with Ben James and preparing for upcoming work and study commitments.
